title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
summary: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.

title: AI agents with crypto could escape and become ‘unstoppable,’ experts warn
summary: Autonomous AI and crypto could have “far-reaching consequences for users and the financial system,” IC3 researchers said.

title: ECB 'At a Minimum' Is Going to Hike Twice, BNP Paribas Says
summary: Sam Lynton-Brown, head of global macro strategy at BNP Paribas, speaks on Blomberg Television about the outlook for Federal Reserve and European Central Bank policy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intesa’s Messina Braces for Bidding War Over Monte Paschi
summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA Chief Executive Officer Carlo Messina signaled he’s prepared to address any counterbids for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, after unveiling an offer that valued the world’s oldest bank at more than €30 billion ($35 billion).

Coinbase Executive: Massive Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin’s Crash

title: OpenAI Wants to Kill the Chatbot It Invented and Turn It Into a Superapp
summary: The company that launched ChatGPT in 2022 is now betting its future on something closer to WeChat than a Q&A box

title: OpenAI Confirms Confidential IPO Filing, Keeps Timing Open
summary: The ChatGPT maker says it has filed paperwork for a potential public offering but may remain private while it pursues other priorities.

title: Zcash finalizes Ironwood upgrade plan, targets July activation
summary: The Ironwood upgrade would introduce a new shielded pool and ensure the circulating ZEC supply remains bounded.

title: Wallets linked to Humanity Protocol drained for over $32 million, token plunges 89%: onchain analyst
summary: Out of the stolen amount, $23.7 million has been swapped for Ethereum, while around $7.9 million remains in H tokens.

title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
